Headline: Blue Line Service Delayed near Montrose
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are standing near Montrose due to police activity. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are standing near Montrose due to police activity. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
